assignments.label: Add Reporting Detail to Collection Var

Flow.description: SB 5/8/24 - Relate Program Activity to Program Participation records SB 4/27/24 - Add reporting lookup to program participation CC 4/24/24 - combining reporting detail and program participant creation into this flow
Flow.interviewLabel: Reporting Process: Create Reporting Detail Records {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Reporting Process: Create Reporting Detail Records

recordLookups.label: Get All Related Program Activities That Has Participants

recordLookups.label: Get All Related Program Activities That Have No Participants

value.stringValue: Name:0, Ethnicity__c:0, Race__c:0, Family_Size__c:0, Income_AMI__c:0, Annual_Family_Income__c:0, EligibilityVerifiedHomeless__c:0

fields.name: dt_validationtext
fields.fieldText: **select at least one participant**

fields.name: Program_Participant_Name_or_Unique_ID
fields.fieldText: Program Participant Name or Unique ID

fields.name: picklist_AreYouLoggingParticipants
fields.fieldText: Are you logging Participants for this reporting detail record?

value.stringValue: Select one or multiple program activities
Select one program activity to report on
Select all program participants that apply
